content: The Teaching tab contains: (1) University of Chicago Booth — Chief AI Officer (CAIO) Program. (2) Pace University — CS 676 Algorithms for Data Science, CS 668 Analytics Capstone Project, CS 667 Practical Data Science (each with YouTube playlists and GitHub repos). (3) Columbia University — GU STAT 4203 Probability Theory (multiple semesters), GU STAT 5204 Statistical Inference, GU STAT 5241 Statistical Machine Learning. (4) Pre-college — Columbia Pre-College Big Data & ML course, curriculum design at Veritas AI (founded by Harvard PhD students). (5) AI4ALL — free ML/AI resources including Udemy courses (Fundamentals of ML, Neural Networks, CNNs, Image-to-Image Networks, NLP) and Packt publisher courses (FinTech Using R, Fundamentals of ML, Fundamentals of Neural Networks). (6) Software Engineering section — MLOps deck, SAAS template on HuggingFace, SAAS Chatbot template. (7) AI/ML Textbooks table — 13 textbooks covering reinforcement learning, Bayesian methods, deep learning, high-dimensional probability, statistical learning, etc. (8) Collected Notes table — notes on economics, probability theory, statistical inference, data science, deep learning, mathematics (PDE, real analysis), money management (SEC acts, security analysis, Series 56, asset pricing), and computer science (principles, programming languages, networks, distributed algorithms).
